challenges.prompt: Write a function `vec_stats(numbers: Vec<f64>) -> String` that computes the minimum, maximum, and mean of the vector, then returns them as `"min=N max=N mean=N"`. All three values should be rounded to 1 decimal place using `(v * 10.0).round() / 10.0`. Write an entry function `stats(input: &str) -> String` that parses a space-separated list of floats and calls `vec_stats`.

Write a function `word_count(text: &str) -> String` that counts the frequency of each word in the input (split on whitespace, case-insensitive), then returns the counts as a sorted comma-separated string in the format `"word:count,word:count"` sorted alphabetically by word. Use a `HashMap`. Write an entry function `count_words(input: &str) -> String`.
